_meta.purpose: Competitor forwarders / brokers. Filter these domains + emails BEFORE merging Panjiva / scraped data into cnee_master. Never prospect competitors — they will forward our rates to their sales team.
_meta.usage: On any new CNEE import (Panjiva, Bloomberg, scraped), match email domain against 'domains' list and full email against 'emails' list. Drop matches before writing to cnee_master_v2.xlsx.
